test_cases.test_case: Successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid credentials.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Signed in successfully.' and is redirected to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.test_case: Failed login with incorrect password
preconditions: User has a registered account.
steps: 2. Enter valid Email/Username and an incorrect Password.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again,' and the password field is cleared.

test_cases.test_case: Login with maximum length email and password
preconditions: User has a registered account with maximum length email and password.
steps: 2. Enter maximum length Email/Username and Password.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Signed in successfully.' and is redirected to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.test_case: Successful registration with valid details
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Account created successfully — please sign in,' and is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Registration fails with invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields with an invalid email format.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating the email format is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields with maximum length data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Account created successfully — please sign in,' and is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Successful fund transfer between accounts
preconditions: User is logged in and has sufficient funds in source account.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page.
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Transfer completed successfully.' with a transaction ID.

test_cases.test_case: Failed fund transfer due to insufficient funds
preconditions: User is logged in and has insufficient funds in source account.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page.
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type.
3. Enter a Transfer Amount greater than available balance.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Insufficient funds' error message.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer with maximum amount allowed
preconditions: User is logged in and has sufficient funds.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page.
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type.
3. Enter the maximum allowed Transfer Amount.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Transfer completed successfully.' with a transaction ID.

test_cases.test_case: Successful bill payment
preconditions: User is logged in and has sufficient funds.
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Payment submitted successfully.' with a reference code.

test_cases.test_case: Failed bill payment due to account number mismatch
preconditions: User is logged in.
steps: 2. Fill in Payee Account Number and Confirm Account Number with different values.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Account numbers do not match' error message.

test_cases.test_case: Bill payment with maximum amount allowed
preconditions: User is logged in and has sufficient funds.
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields with maximum allowed Payment Amount.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Payment submitted successfully.' with a reference code.

test_cases.test_case: Successful update of contact information
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Update Contact Info page.
steps: 1. Update any field with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Profile updated successfully.' and the data refreshes.

test_cases.test_case: Failed update of contact information with invalid ZIP code
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Update Contact Info page.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating the ZIP code is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Update contact info with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Update Contact Info page.
steps: 1. Fill in all fields with maximum length data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Profile updated successfully.' and the data refreshes.

test_cases.test_case: Successful request for a loan
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Request Loan page.
steps: 2. Fill in Loan Amount within allowed range.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Loan approved and created successfully!' with account details.

test_cases.test_case: Loan request fails due to insufficient collateral value
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Request Loan page.
steps: 2. Fill in Loan Amount and Down Payment Amount that do not meet requirements.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Inadequate collateral value.' error message.

test_cases.test_case: Loan request with maximum allowed amount
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Request Loan page.
steps: 2. Fill in Loan Amount at the maximum limit.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Loan approved and created successfully!' with account details.

test_cases.test_case: Successful card request
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Manage Cards page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields in the card request form.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Card request submitted successfully.' with a tracking ID.

test_cases.test_case: Card request fails due to incomplete address
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Manage Cards page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields but leave Shipping Address incomplete.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating the address is incomplete.

test_cases.test_case: Card request with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Manage Cards page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields with maximum length data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Card request submitted successfully.' with a tracking ID.

test_cases.test_case: Successful investment trade execution
preconditions: User is logged in and has sufficient buying power.
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields in the trade funds form.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Trade executed successfully.' with an order ID.

test_cases.test_case: Trade execution fails due to insufficient buying power
preconditions: User is logged in and has insufficient buying power.
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields in the trade funds form.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating insufficient buying power.

test_cases.test_case: Trade execution with maximum quantity allowed
preconditions: User is logged in and has sufficient buying power.
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields with maximum quantity.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Trade executed successfully.' with an order ID.

test_cases.test_case: Successful generation of account statement
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: 1. Fill in the Statement Period and select an Account.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Statement generated successfully.' with the relevant transactions displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Failed statement generation due to invalid date range
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: 1. Fill in an invalid date range for Statement Period.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Unable to generate statement — please try again later.'

test_cases.test_case: Statement generation with maximum date range
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: 1. Fill in the maximum allowed date range for Statement Period.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Statement generated successfully.' with the relevant transactions displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Successful password change
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Security Settings page.
steps: 1. Fill in Current Password, New Password, and Confirm New Password.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Password changed successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Password change fails due to mismatched new passwords
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Security Settings page.
steps: 1. Fill in Current Password, New Password, and a different Confirm New Password.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating the passwords do not match.

test_cases.test_case: Password change with maximum length new password
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Security Settings page.
steps: 1. Fill in Current Password, maximum length New Password, and Confirm New Password.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Password changed successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Successful message sent to support center
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Support Center page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields in the secure message form.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Message sent successfully.' with a ticket ID.

test_cases.test_case: Failed message sending due to missing message body
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Support Center page.
steps: 1. Fill in Subject and Category but leave Message Body empty.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating the message body is required.

test_cases.test_case: Message sent with maximum length subject
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Support Center page.
steps: 1. Fill in Subject with maximum length text.
2. Fill in all other required fields.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Message sent successfully.' with a ticket ID.

test_cases.test_case: Successful callback request
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Support Center page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields in the schedule callback form.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Callback request submitted.' and receives an email confirmation.

test_cases.test_case: Callback request fails due to invalid phone number format
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Support Center page.
steps: 1. Fill in all required fields but enter an invalid Phone Number.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees an error message indicating the phone number format is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Callback request with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Support Center page.
steps: 1. Fill in all fields with maximum length data.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Callback request submitted.' and receives an email confirmation.
